# Dominion Governance

Dominion Governance is an AI governance, risk and enterprise-readiness advisory for boards, executives and management teams. The firm helps organisations govern AI, protect enterprise value, build evidence, improve controls and prepare for scrutiny.

Canonical site: https://www.dominiongovernance.com/
Contact: advisory@dominiongovernance.com

## Core proposition

Govern AI. Protect Value. Build Evidence.

Dominion Governance is not a law firm, statutory audit firm, cyber assurance provider, software reseller, regulator or certification body. Its role is advisory: exposure discovery, governance design, policy support, control mapping, documentation, evidence readiness and governance-led implementation support.

## Request a discussion

Use the native request form at https://www.dominiongovernance.com/request/ or email advisory@dominiongovernance.com.

Do not submit highly confidential material, client files, passwords, sensitive datasets or legal documents through the initial request form.
